name: What evidence do I need for a warehouse slip and fall claim?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for a warehouse slip and fall claim?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Incident report, medical records, photos of hazard, witness contacts, and maintenance logs.** Video from cameras is gold.[1][4] Key factors: timely reporting preserves footage; doctor nexus letter. Collect before scene changes; chain of custody for items. Strong evidence = quick approval.[9]
